title: Miliband backs 7th Carbon Budget
snippet:
Target of 87% cut in emissions for the period from 2038 to 2042 to be made binding

The post Miliband backs 7th Carbon Budget appeared first on Energy Live News
ai_summary: Government backing for 7th Carbon Budget with 87% emissions reduction target creates longer-term policy certainty for renewable energy and carbon reduction investments that could support tem's I&C renewable energy positioning.
ai_reasoning: Background reading on UK climate policy. Relevant to tem's market direction and customer decarbonisation drivers, but not an immediate action item. No direct regulatory change affecting pricing, settlement, or operations this week.
